position_sizing_rule: Buy half position when RSI(14) drops under 25, add the rest if it goes under 20
session_filters: Do not trade in last 30 minutes

explicit_ambiguities.ambiguity: What time zone is considered for 'end of day'?
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: Different time zones could lead to different exit points and affect strategy performance.

explicit_ambiguities.ambiguity: What is the exact definition of 'end of day'?
explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Assumed market close at 4 PM ET
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: A different end of day time could result in holding positions longer or exiting earlier.

explicit_ambiguities.ambiguity: What happens if RSI(14) does not reach 50 before end of day?
explicit_ambiguities.assumption_used_for_backtest: Exit at end of day regardless of RSI level
explicit_ambiguities.impact_if_different: Holding positions overnight could introduce additional risks and affect returns.
